data.title: Many Korean banks are more keen to get involved in the crypto business and are paying attention to the local leading exchange Upbit
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Several South Korean banks are paying attention to Upbit, a local leading cryptocurrency exchange, and are interested in reaching a cooperation with it. South Korean regulators recently said that they will finally approve South Korean companies to use their balance sheets to purchase Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies later this year.
KEB Hana Bank and Woori Bank are currently not "associated" with any local cryptocurrency exchange, but are now "paying attention to Upbit's contract situation." The latter's contract with K Bank will expire in October. (Newspim)

data.title: Musk officially releases AI model Grok 3
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Musk's artificial intelligence startup xAI officially released the new generation chatbot Grok 3. Musk previously called it "the smartest artificial intelligence on earth."

data.title: XRP Price Pulls Back From Highs—Are Bulls Still in Control?
data.description:
XRP price is consolidating gains above the $2.60 zone. The price must clear the $2.720 resistance to start a fresh increase in the near term. XRP price started a decent upward move above the $2.60 zone. The price is now trading below $2.70 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average. There was a break below a key bullish trend line with support at $2.6880 on the hourly chart of the XRP/USD pair...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-pulls-back-2-60/

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: Driven by artificial intelligence, the average share price of China's Internet companies has risen by 22% since the beginning of the year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: JPMorgan Chase's report pointed out that the average share price of China's Internet industry has risen by 22% since the beginning of the year, measured by KWEB (KraneShares CSI China InternetETF), and believed that this was mainly driven by the rekindling of China's artificial intelligence industry.
The report stated that within the coverage of JPMorgan, except for Tencent Holdings (00700.HK), most artificial intelligence-related stocks have outperformed the industry average so far this year, such as Ali Health (00241.HK) rose 47%, Kuaishou (01024.HK) rose 29%, Kingsoft Cloud (03896.HK) rose 98%, and Baidu (09888.HK) rose 16%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Animoca Brands and FLock.io Collaborate to Develop the First AI VC Agent HeyAni
Gate.io APP homepage "Expert" section upgraded to strengthen trading strategies and content ecology
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, the [Expert] section of the Gate.io APP homepage has now been completely upgraded. This update introduces two core sections, "Trading Master" and "Creator", based on the optimization of the user interface, aiming to improve the efficiency of users' trading decisions and enrich information acquisition channels.
It is reported that the "Trading Master" section ranks users based on four dimensions: asset size, yield, income amount and maximum drawdown, helping traders to intuitively understand market performance and discover excellent investors and their trading strategies. In addition, the "Creator" section brings together multiple industry content sources such as anchors, big Vs, media, and Twitter, providing multi-dimensional screening functions.

data.title: OKX will launch PIUSDT perpetual contract and leveraged trading
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will launch the PIUSDT perpetual contract at 5:00 pm (UTC+8) on February 20, 2025, and will launch PI's leveraged trading and simple coin earning services at 12:00 noon (UTC+8) on February 21, 2025. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Kelsier Ventures Is Preparing to Expand for "Second LIBRA Project" in Nigeria
data.description:
Kelsier Ventures, the company behind the controversial meme coin LIBRA, was reportedly in discussions with Nigerian authorities to develop a similar project.
source: https://coincu.com/322931-kelsier-ventures-preparing-to-expand-in-nigeria

data.title: Chainalysis: Sanctioned entities received $15.8 billion in cryptocurrencies last year, accounting for nearly 39% of illegal crypto transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News A new report from Chainalysis shows that sanctioned entities received $15.8 billion in cryptocurrency in 2024, accounting for nearly 39% of all illegal crypto transactions. Compared with individual entities, the share of sanctioned jurisdictions in sanctions-related activities hit an all-time high, accounting for nearly 60% by the end of 2024.
As Western law enforcement agencies step up their crackdowns, individuals and state-backed networks in Iran and Russia are seeking alternative financial systems to bypass Western restrictions. The report said that in 2024, both countries adjusted their financial strategies to use DeFi and KYC-free exchanges to maintain financial operations. At the same time, Iran and Russia have strengthened their financial ties with BRICS countries, and Russia has promoted the use of stablecoins and central bank digital currencies instead of US dollars for trade settlement. (Cryptonews)

data.title: Grok 3 is now available in Apple App Store update
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the screenshots shared by DogeDesigner, Grok 3 is now available in the Apple App Store update. Previously, Musk called it the smartest artificial intelligence on earth.
